title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: GRANT UNION JR/SR HIGH SCHOOL SBHC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing and birth control counseling. 911 S Canyon Boulevard John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% FPL Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 562-0366 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 562-0366 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Grant County Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GRANT UNION JR/SR HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
